/destinations.get:
import (
  "fmt"
  "encoding/json"
  "context"
  "github.com/Celitech/CelitechSDKGo"
)

config := celitech.NewConfig()
config.SetClientID("CLIENT_ID")
config.SetClientSecret("CLIENT_SECRET")
client := celitech.NewCelitech(config)

response, err := client.Destinations.ListDestinations(context.Background())
if err != nil {
  panic(err)
}

fmt.Println(response)

config.SetClientSecret("CLIENT_SECRET")

/purchases/v2.post:
import (
  "fmt"
  "encoding/json"
  "context"
  "github.com/Celitech/CelitechSDKGo"
  "github.com/Celitech/CelitechSDKGo/purchases"
)

config := celitech.NewConfig()
config.SetClientID("CLIENT_ID")
config.SetClientSecret("CLIENT_SECRET")
client := celitech.NewCelitech(config)


request := purchases.CreatePurchaseV2Request{
  Destination: "FRA",
  DataLimitInGb: float64(1),
  Quantity: float64(1),
}

response, err := client.Purchases.CreatePurchaseV2(context.Background(), request)
if err != nil {
  panic(err)
}

fmt.Println(response)

/purchases.post:
import (
  "fmt"
  "encoding/json"
  "context"
  "github.com/Celitech/CelitechSDKGo"
  "github.com/Celitech/CelitechSDKGo/purchases"
)

config := celitech.NewConfig()
config.SetClientID("CLIENT_ID")
config.SetClientSecret("CLIENT_SECRET")
client := celitech.NewCelitech(config)


request := purchases.CreatePurchaseRequest{
  Destination: "FRA",
  DataLimitInGb: float64(1),
  StartDate: "2023-11-01",
  EndDate: "2023-11-20",
}

response, err := client.Purchases.CreatePurchase(context.Background(), request)
if err != nil {
  panic(err)
}

fmt.Println(response)
